metadata.title: Server LM — Documents at your service
metadata.description: Ask. Analyze. Decide. On your own documents. Precise answers, citing sources — without your files leaving your network.

insights.titulo: The information was already there. Server LM finds it.
insights.subtitulo: Vector semantic search to understand meaning, and relational search for precision queries and tasks.
insights.card1Desc: Privacy. Your physical files never leave your internal network — only the processed text is synced to the chat.
insights.card2Desc: Languages: Spanish, English, Portuguese, French, and German. Built for international teams.
insights.card3Desc: Multi-organization: each subsidiary with its own configuration, branding, and completely isolated data.

textFill: Ask questions about your contracts, reports, and procedures. Get verifiable answers with citations. Define the rules in plain language — no developers, no data leaving your network.

problema.tituloAccent: Finding it is the hard part.
problema.descripcion: Teams accumulate thousands of contracts, reports, minutes, regulations, procedures, and emails. The problem isn't a lack of information — it's that it's scattered and hard to use.
problema.sin1: Opening documents one by one to read the content
problema.sin2: Manually copying and pasting text to compare
problema.sin3: Information that "is known to exist but can't be found"
problema.sin4: Risk of confidential documents reaching the wrong people
problema.con0: Ask in natural language and get an answer in seconds
problema.con1: Semantic search that connects related documents
problema.con2: Comparisons, summaries, and analysis in a single message
problema.con3: The system reads and connects all information automatically
problema.con4: Strict permission control: each user only sees what's theirs

capacidades.titulo1: It's not a file search engine. It's an assistant that
capacidades.item0Desc: Summarize documents, answer specific questions, cite exact texts, compare contracts, extract key clauses.
capacidades.item1Desc: Extract entities, deadlines, and risks. Detect contradictions, build timelines, and identify technical terms.
capacidades.item2Desc: Generate email drafts, minutes, reports, checklists, comparison tables, and formal responses.
capacidades.item3Desc: Support decision-making with compliance analysis, pros and cons, and identify missing information.
capacidades.item4Desc: Create thematic workspaces, group documents by concept, and suggest automatic labels and classifications.

comoFunciona.subtitulo: Vector semantic search — AI that understands the meaning of your documents, not just their words.
comoFunciona.paso0Desc: Index PDFs, Word, Excel, or text. Server LM reads and processes them automatically.
comoFunciona.paso1Desc: We transform the document representation into records in a semantic database.
comoFunciona.paso2Desc: Write in plain language. "Give me the active contracts" or "Summarize the January reports."
comoFunciona.paso3Desc: Semantic search across all your documents and a precise answer, citing the source files.

diferenciadores.item0Desc: All data is handled encrypted. For Enterprise and Corporate plans, hybrid architecture: processing happens on a local server inside your company.
diferenciadores.item1Desc: A corporation with subsidiaries, a municipality with health and education corporations: each entity with its own configuration, branding, and users. Data completely isolated.
diferenciadores.item2Desc: The platform adapts colors, logo, and name for each client. Your users will see a tool with your company's visual identity.
diferenciadores.item3Desc: Administrators define which modules, documents, and features each role sees. Each person's menu is built dynamically.
diferenciadores.item4Desc: Interface in Spanish, English, Portuguese, French, and German. Designed for international teams and corporations with presence in multiple countries.
diferenciadores.item5Desc: Business rules and assistant behavior are defined in plain text. No developers needed.

modulos.titulo: Modular capabilities. Enable what you need.
modulos.item0Desc: Upload, organize, process, and query documents. Automatic pipeline for scanning, chunking, and vectorization with intelligent chat over your files.
modulos.item1Desc: Chat interface with real-time responses (streaming). Multi-turn context with history over documents, data, and system features.
modulos.item2Desc: Communication to users via multiple channels: in-app, email, SMS, WhatsApp, and Telegram. Configurable templates and automatic triggers.
modulos.item3Desc: Management of groups, entities, users, roles, and permissions. Visual configuration (colors, logo, name) and complete audit of operations.

seguridad.descripcion: Server LM was designed from the start on the premise that confidential documents must remain under your organization's control.
seguridad.punto0: Data encrypted at rest in the database (AES-256)
seguridad.punto1: Internal operation only via APIs: no possibility of injecting malicious prompts
seguridad.punto2: Two-factor authentication and secure JWT tokens
seguridad.punto3: Role-based access control (RBAC) with granular permissions
seguridad.punto5: Complete audit trail: every action logged with user, date, and module
seguridad.punto7: Optional local processing (Enterprise/Corp plans): physical documents never leave your network

planes.titulo: A plan for every organization size.
planes.plan1F1: Access control by area or role
planes.plan1F2: Each member sees only their area

porQueNosotros.item0Desc: For professionals, teams, companies, and organizations with complex realities: multiple entities, hierarchical levels, privacy requirements, and local regulations.
porQueNosotros.item1Desc: Compatible with Claude (Anthropic), GPT-4 (OpenAI), Gemini (Google), and open source models. You're not tied to a single provider.
porQueNosotros.item2Desc: Ready-to-use SaaS. You just need to upload documents and configure users — no own infrastructure for Personal, Team, and Enterprise plans.
porQueNosotros.item3Desc: From an independent professional to a corporation with dozens of entities. The same system grows with you.
porQueNosotros.item4Desc: Use Server LM in your services. Operable via MCP and CLI. Your own logo and corporate colors in the Chat.

cta.titulo: Interested in Server LM for your work, team, or company?
cta.subtitulo: Contact us for a free, no-commitment demo. 15 days free, no payment method required.

footer.tagline: Documents at your service. Intelligent document management platform.
